headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Slide as Trump Warns Iran Strikes Could Get 'Much Worse': Analyst Flags Major 'Wall' BTC Bulls Must Break
summary: Leading cryptocurrencies fell alongside stocks on Wednesday as the U.S. strikes against Iran threaten peace negotiations. Cryptocurrency24-Hour Gains +/-Price (Recorded at 9:20 p.m. EDT)Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC)-1.90%$62,323.71Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) -1.76%$1,744.96XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) -1.87%$1.09Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) -2.44%$78.29Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) -2.07%$0.07265 Crypto Market Shakes Bitcoin slipped under $61,500, then climbed back above $62,000 overnight. Ethereum oscillated within the $1,700 regio
